# M61 Hardening No-Premature Fixtures

Focused repair fixtures for Task 61.5.

- `allow-m61-working-artifacts.json`: M61 working artifacts are present and should not be blocked by no-premature checks.
- `block-m61-completion-early.json`: premature M61 completion artifacts must be blocked.
- `block-m62-anywhere.json`: any M62 artifact path must be blocked.
